message:
feat(vc_tui): add ftui and ftui-harness workspace dependencies (bd-luk)

Wire FrankenTUI into the workspace so vc_tui can begin porting screens
from ratatui to the Elm-architecture framework. ratatui + crossterm
kept temporarily until all screens are migrated.

- Workspace: ftui (path dep to ../frankentui/crates/ftui)
- Workspace: ftui-harness (path dep for snapshot testing)
- vc_tui: ftui in [dependencies], ftui-harness in [dev-dependencies]

Unblocks: bd-h8l (Model trait), bd-3vb (theme port), bd-ng3 (widget helpers)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ vc_query.workspace = true
 vc_alert.workspace = true
 ratatui.workspace = true
 crossterm.workspace = true
+ftui.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
@@ -28,3 +29,4 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest.workspace = true
 mockall.workspace = true
+ftui-harness.workspace = true
